pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Welcome, {player_name}! I am Professor Sole, the world's foremost expert on Sneaker culture.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: This world is inhabited by creatures called Sneakers! Some collect them as a hobby...

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Others use them for battle. Myself — I study them professionally. Now, are you ready to choose your first partner?

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Excellent! Three Sneakers await you. Each has its own Faction and personality. Choose wisely — your journey begins here!

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: A fine choice, {player_name}! Take good care of your new partner.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Oh! And before I forget — take this Sneakerdex. It records data on every Sneaker you encounter.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Head north through Route 1 to reach Lace-Up Village. Your adventure begins now!

pages.speaker: Flip
pages.text: I already know my kicks are fresher than yours. Let's prove it!

pages.speaker: Flip
pages.text: Okay okay, you got lucky. But I'm going to be WAY ahead of you next time.

pages.speaker: Flip
pages.text: Heh! Like I said. Your kicks can't match mine. See you on the road, rookie!

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: Incredible work, {player_name}! You've authenticated all 8 Grail sneakers.

pages.speaker: Prof. Sole
pages.text: You are truly the greatest Sneaker trainer the world has ever known!
